name: repo-graph
description: Deterministic code graph tool for analyzing legacy codebases

scripts.test:cli: pnpm run build && vitest run test/cli
scripts._cargo:check: if ! command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'error: cargo not found on PATH. Install Rust via rustup (https://rustup.rs). Pinned toolchain: rust/rust-toolchain.toml' >&2; exit 1; fi
scripts.test:parity: vitest run test/parity && pnpm run _cargo:check && cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -p repo-graph-detectors --test parity
scripts.test:storage:parity: vitest run test/storage-parity && pnpm run _cargo:check && cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -p repo-graph-storage --test parity
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:rust
